title: Lei Shuo's Blog
subTitle: Welcome to my personal blog
script: <script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){var s=document.createElement('style');s.innerHTML='@keyframes fluid{0%{background-position:0% 50%}50%{background-position:100% 50%}100%{background-position:0% 50%}}html,body{background:linear-gradient(300deg,#ff3300,#ff00cc,#0099ff,#00ffcc)!important;background-size:500% 500%!important;animation:fluid 12s ease infinite!important;min-height:100vh!important}.markdown-body,.FileList,.side{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.92)!important;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-radius:15px;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);padding:25px!important;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5)}.Header,.footer{background:transparent!important;border:none!important}#left-panel{position:fixed;left:20px;top:20px;bottom:20px;width:240px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.95);border-radius:12px;padding:15px;z-index:9999;box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);overflow-y:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;border:1px solid #fff}#search-input{width:100%;padding:10px;margin-bottom:15px;border:2px solid #eee;border-radius:8px;font-size:14px;background:#f9f9f9;transition:0.3s}#search-input:focus{border-color:#0099ff;outline:none;background:#fff}.sidebar-item{display:block;padding:8px 10px;color:#444;text-decoration:none;border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:4px;font-size:13px;transition:0.2s;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}.sidebar-item:hover{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#0099ff,#00ffcc);color:#fff;transform:translateX(3px)}.sidebar-label{font-weight:bold;margin:15px 0 5px;color:#333;font-size:14px;border-bottom:2px solid #ff00cc;padding-bottom:2px}@media(max-width:1100px){#left-panel{display:none}}';document.head.appendChild(s);fetch('/blogBase.json').then(r=>r.json()).then(d=>{var p=document.createElement('div');p.id='left-panel';var i=document.createElement('input');i.id='search-input';i.placeholder='🔍 搜索文章...';i.oninput=function(e){var v=e.target.value.toLowerCase();p.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-item').forEach(l=>{l.style.display=l.innerText.toLowerCase().includes(v)?'block':'none'})};p.appendChild(i);var posts=Object.values(d).sort((a,b)=>b.id-a.id);var g={};posts.forEach(x=>{var l=x.labels[0]||'其他';if(!g[l])g[l]=[];g[l].push(x)});Object.keys(g).sort().forEach(k=>{var t=document.createElement('div');t.className='sidebar-label';t.innerText=k;p.appendChild(t);g[k].forEach(x=>{var a=document.createElement('a');a.className='sidebar-item';a.href=x.postUrl;a.innerText=x.postTitle;a.title=x.postTitle;p.appendChild(a)})});document.body.appendChild(p)}).catch(e=>console.log(e));});</script>
